page_metadata.biotools__summary: G-POT is a primer set selection tool that minimizes the number of primers needed to amplify a set of loci while ensuring that each locus is amplified by a pair of primers located within L basepairs of each other, where L is an input parameter.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: G-POT is a primer set selection tool that minimizes the number of primers needed to amplify a set of loci while ensuring that each locus is amplified by a pair of primers located within L basepairs of each other, where L is an input parameter.
